text:
Hello!

I have successfully updated the port to 5.5.4.15 version recently.
But the distfile from the URL (http://download.lbs.solidcharity.com/tarballs/tpokorra/mono/monodevelop-5.5.4.15.tar.bz2) has been used.

Please see the attached file (monodevelop_5.5.4.15.tgz).
